context.description: No seed capital secured. The brand cannot source materials, produce samples, or run any paid marketing without initial funding. Blocks all downstream operational gaps.

evidence.note: Actor identified 'No seed funding secured yet' as an explicit constraint. Intent-grade only — gap existence inferred from stated constraint, not verified by financial records.

context.description: No manufacturing partner identified. The brand's inclusive sizing mandate (broad size range, multiple gender cuts) requires a production partner who can handle extended size grading and small initial runs without prohibitive minimums.

evidence.note: Actor identified 'No manufacturing partner identified' as an explicit constraint. Intent-grade only — gap existence inferred from stated constraint.

context.description: No existing distribution channel or community base. The mission assumes a community-first launch model can substitute for paid acquisition, but no community has been built yet. Without an audience, the launch hypothesis cannot be tested.

evidence.note: Actor identified 'No existing distribution channel' as a constraint and stated a community-first assumption. Gap derived from the distance between the assumption and current state. Intent-grade only.

context.description: No brand identity, visual language, or creative direction established. Inclusive premium positioning requires a coherent aesthetic that signals quality and belonging to underrepresented groups without alienating or appropriating. This creative foundation must exist before product or community work can be grounded.

evidence.note: Gap inferred from mission statement: inclusive brand requires a defined creative identity that does not yet exist. Intent-grade only — no design work observed.
